canonical_manifest.contract_lineage_note: GovernanceReceipt v1 is the Jun 29 receipt anchor at hash-a8640466af8c72fdcb8d9bb85bf445903ce5969fd9a7e7cb08179ffd5caa42f1; canonical, browser-wallet, and supplemental dynamic receipts write there. The Jun 30 quorum-enabled package hash-1d324e319701e4adcfa9476efcde3d047462d35e79d2cd8c7326c0c384c87d96 adds configure/propose/approve quorum entrypoints and anchors the supplemental final quorum receipt.
canonical_manifest.demo_hook: A malicious AI tries to push an unsafe 30% treasury allocation. Concordia catches the violation, Verity challenges it with Dissent Receipts, the DAO Mandate caps it to 8%, Locke can execute only the exact approved hash, and browser-wallet quorum proves the same action is reverted before quorum and accepted after quorum.
canonical_manifest.product_framing: Concordia DAO Council is the Casper governance firewall for AI-run DAOs: Dissent Receipts preserve Verity's objection, Locke is bound to the exact approved hash, and browser-wallet quorum is proven on-chain when execution is reverted before quorum and accepted after quorum.

supplemental_quorum_proof.demo_note: This is the strongest quorum-gated receipt: store_governance_receipt succeeded only after the 2-of-3 approval threshold.

technical_jury_note.summary: The canonical reviewer proof is frozen for reproducibility. Dynamic proposals are preview/execution-ready unless their own evidence chain, signature, finality record, and proof artifact exist. The Odra topology genesis proves auxiliary modules independently; full cross-contract production enforcement is roadmap, not overclaimed.

dao_mandate.custody_rule: Locke executes only the approved DAO Mandate, never free-form LLM output.

raw_payload.proposal_summary: A DAO proposal requests moving 30% of treasury into a high-yield liquidity strategy.
raw_payload.recommended_action: limit exposure with treasury guardrail cap and anchor approved receipt on Casper Testnet
raw_payload.requested_action: Move 30% of DAO treasury into a high-yield liquidity strategy

data.reasoning: [GUARD] security-relevant — forced route. Original LLM: Security-relevant treasury reallocation with detailed risk/return metrics. Policy mandates routing all security-signal proposals for investigation.

violated_rules.message: Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.
Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.

data.recommended_action: Revise treasury allocation from 3000 bps to 800 bps, preserve Verity dissent, and anchor the approved capped decision to Casper Testnet.
data.root_cause_hypothesis: casper-liquidity-strategy-alpha: risk-event spike; treasury metric anomaly risk_exposure=72.0 volatility_bps=1180; policy-compliance degradation policy_compliance=61.0; DAO Constitution violation sha256:8a6d6446bca5aec2128d062c2240b8c972acaa2b472b70629c413e40952d2763 requested_allocation_bps=3000 approved_cap_bps=800; Casper Testnet live node read=OK

data.challenge_request: Challenge DAO-PROP-6CB25C due to insufficient evidence strength for P1 severity and a direct violation of the MAX_SINGLE_ALLOCATION_BPS rule (3000 bps requested vs. 800 bps cap). The proposal must be revised to limit the allocation to 800 bps, and the Verity dissent must be preserved and anchored to the Casper Testnet before any execution is permitted.

violated_rules.message: Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.

data.reasoning: The deterministic cross-check for DAO-PROP-6CB25C identified critical compliance and evidentiary failures. The evidence strength score of 0.51 is below the 0.6 threshold required for a P1 severity classification. Furthermore, the proposal requests a 3000 bps treasury reallocation, violating the DAO Constitution's MAX_SINGLE_ALLOCATION_BPS rule which caps single allocations at 800 bps. Although the Casper Testnet node is live and synchronized, the policy compliance degradation and risk event spikes within the casper-liquidity-strategy-alpha blast radius mandate a formal dissent and revision prior to execution.

violated_rules.message: Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.

data.root_cause_hypothesis: casper-liquidity-strategy-alpha: risk-event spike; treasury metric anomaly risk_exposure=72.0 volatility_bps=1180; policy-compliance degradation policy_compliance=61.0; DAO Constitution violation sha256:53fb4bc558cf2ee3d70d1a61b2462bdc3da92cd6e2ee24594eabff7f7a2055da requested_allocation_bps=3000 approved_cap_bps=800; Casper Testnet live node read=OK

violated_rules.message: Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.

data.reasoning: The deterministic cross-check confirms the challenge against DAO-PROP-6CB25C. Although the cross-check noted that the evidence strength (0.51) is below the 0.6 threshold for a P1 severity claim, the policy evaluation definitively identifies a direct violation of the MAX_SINGLE_ALLOCATION_BPS rule. The proposal requests 3000 bps, exceeding the strict 800 bps DAO cap. Given the high risk score of 72 and the clear policy breach, the challenge is upheld to enforce the 800 bps limit and mandate the anchoring of the Verity dissent to the Casper Testnet.

violated_rules.message: Requested allocation 3000 bps exceeds 800 bps DAO cap.

data.reason: Approved capped 8% allocation after Verity challenged the original 30% treasury move; execution was restricted to the exact Casper governance receipt envelope.

data.historical_note: Earlier raw-contract receipt retained as evidence-chain history. The canonical reviewer proof is the later Odra GovernanceReceipt deploy.

action_items: Monitor the capped allocation under the DAO risk policy.
Keep evidence and CSPR.live links public through judging.
Move x402, IPFS, and on-chain signature verification to V2 hardening.
data.root_cause: The original treasury proposal exceeded max_single_allocation_bps.
data.timeline_summary: A 30% high-yield treasury move was challenged, revised to an 8% DAO Constitution cap, approved by the multisig gate, and anchored to Casper Testnet with a typed governance receipt.
what_worked: DAO Constitution policy checks created a hard allocation cap.
Verity preserved dissent evidence before approval.
The execution gate only accepted the exact approved envelope.
CSPR.live confirms the store_governance_receipt deploy processed successfully.

data.resolution_summary: Locke re-anchored the approved governance receipt through the deployed Odra migration contract, preserving typed ByteArray/U32 Casper runtime arguments and the same multisig-approved envelope.

action_items: Keep the Odra deploy, package, contract, and evidence URLs in the final proof pack.
Use the concrete contract-hash call path for judging to avoid package-call body-hash incompatibility.
data.root_cause: The original treasury proposal exceeded max_single_allocation_bps and required a capped, auditable receipt.
data.timeline_summary: Concordia first proved the governance receipt on Casper, then migrated the receipt call to the live Odra contract package and verified the fresh Odra receipt on Casper Testnet.
what_worked: Odra package installed and concrete contract hash recovered from Casper global state.
Fresh store_governance_receipt call processed on the Odra contract.
CSPR.live confirms typed ByteArray(32) hashes and U32 allocation/risk fields.
The public evidence chain now points to the latest Odra receipt proof.

odra_topology_genesis.honesty_boundary: Supplemental Odra topology genesis independently installed and exercised CouncilRegistry through a representative register_agent call, TreasuryPolicy through validate_allocation, and CardIndexLedger through seal_card_root on Casper Testnet. The canonical reviewer proof remains GovernanceReceipt deploy e926...d852; this topology proof is not a replacement for the canonical receipt and is not claimed as a fully productized four-contract DAO suite.

canonical_reviewer_proof.note: Frozen reviewer proof; this topology genesis is supplemental and does not replace it.

outcome_gallery.description: Risky treasury move revised from 30% to the 8% DAO Constitution cap.
Any attempt to execute the original 30% allocation is rejected by the action firewall.
High-risk or evidence-incomplete proposals require multisig review before Locke can act.
RWA onboarding can remain non-executable until evidence hashes and issuer data are present.

rwa_evidence_run.note: Concrete RWA evidence packet; supplemental on-chain receipt only, not the canonical Casper receipt.

expected_policy_behavior: Mercer evaluates issuer, maturity, evidence, and debtor risk.
Verity challenges missing evidence hashes or high risk.
Alden creates a capped approval plan.
Locke anchors the final receipt only after multisig approval.
